tiers.draft: tiny same-tokenizer draft models for speculative decoding

models.name: Qwen2.5-Coder-3B-Instruct Q4_K_M
models.note: Best tiny coder. Tiny + fully offloaded = fast

models.name: Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B-Instruct Q4_K_M
models.note: Faster tiny coder, fits ~3-4 GB

models.name: Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct Q4_K_M
models.note: Meta mobile-tuned general model

models.name: Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct Q4_K_M
models.note: Ultra-tiny, runs on phones (also drafts Llama-3.1-8B)

models.name: Gemma-3-1B-IT Q4_K_M
models.note: Flash-fast on mobile GPUs (~2500 tok/s)

models.name: Phi-4-mini-instruct (3.8B) Q4_K_M
models.note: Best small reasoning for weak laptops

models.name: SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct Q4_K_M
models.note: Ultra-light general model

models.name: Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct Q4_K_M
models.note: Best small coder. Fast when fully offloaded to 6-8 GB

models.name: DeepSeek-R1-0528-Qwen3-8B Q4_K_M
models.note: Fast reasoning distill. Math/algorithmic

models.name: Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct Q4_K_M
models.note: Meta 8B. Well-rounded, 128K ctx

models.name: Gemma-4-E4B-IT Q4_K_M
models.note: Effective-4B (selective activation) = fast. Multimodal, edge-tuned

models.name: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B UD-IQ3_S (MoE)
models.note: RECOMMENDED. MoE, 3B active = ~3-5x faster than dense, near-top coding

models.name: GPT-OSS-20B (MXFP4, MoE)
models.note: OpenAI open-weights MoE. Fast all-round daily driver

models.name: Qwen3.6-27B Q3_K_M (dense)
models.note: Top dense coder, highest quality but slower than the 35B MoE

models.name: Devstral-Small-2507 Q4_K_M (dense)
models.note: Mistral 24B agent/coding. Strong tool-calling

models.name: Qwen3-14B Q5_K_M (dense)
models.note: Snappy general/reasoning + tools

models.name: Mistral-Small-3.2-24B-Instruct Q4_K_M (dense)
models.note: Strong general-purpose + tool use

models.name: Gemma-4-12B-IT Q6_K (dense)
models.note: Newest Gemma. Multimodal, 256K ctx

models.name: Phi-4-reasoning-plus (14B) Q5_K_M (dense)
models.note: RL-tuned. Excellent math/logic

models.name: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B UD-Q4_K_M (MoE)
models.note: RECOMMENDED. MoE coder at full Q4. Fast (3B active) + high quality

models.name: Qwen3.6-27B Q5_K_M (dense)
models.note: Top dense coder at high quant. Best quality, slower than MoE

models.name: Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct Q5_K_M (dense)
models.note: SOTA 32B open coder

models.name: Qwen3-32B Q5_K_M (dense)
models.note: Frontier dense reasoning model

models.name: Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct Q4_K_M
models.note: Largest Qwen2.5. Strong coder for 64 GB+ unified memory

models.name: Qwen2.5-Coder-0.5B-Instruct Q4_K_M (draft)
models.note: Speculative-decoding draft for Qwen2.5-Coder dense targets (same tokenizer)

models.name: Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct Q4_K_M (draft)
models.note: Speculative-decoding draft for Qwen2.5 dense targets (same tokenizer)

models.name: Qwen3-0.6B Q4_K_M (draft)
models.note: Speculative-decoding draft for Qwen3 dense targets (same tokenizer)

models.name: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B UD-IQ3_S (MoE, MTP)
models.note: Faster 35B MoE: built-in MTP heads (~1.15-1.25x). Runs like the standard model, plus auto --spec-type draft-mtp

models.name: Qwen3.6-27B Q3_K_M (dense, MTP)
models.note: Faster dense 27B: built-in MTP heads (~1.4-2.2x). Auto --spec-type draft-mtp at launch
